title: Reach Circles
description: Circles around every player that show how much hit range/reach every player has. Calculates effective reach based on ping and velocity. For PvP use.
body:
# Reach circles

![Ping compensation at work, correctly showing hit advantage.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f469152499a5ca185261e67fc539e03aebf0602d.jpeg)

Highly configurable client-side utility mod that displays circles around players, showing how far they can reach. By default also calculates effective reach based on velocity and ping. Circles can also change color if someone is in your range, or if you're in their.

I originally made this mod to show players on my server how ping affects reach, since I've gotten a lot of false reports of players reach hacking. Since then I've also used it as a PvP utility mod, helping me to better distance myself to the players I'm fighting.


_Expect bugs as I am new to mod making._

For **feature requests**, **bug reports** or if you **want me to add another version**, dm me on discord. **User: viboten**

**Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**
